regions.text: Every hour of our lives we do things possible only because of work done for us by other people. Who grew the cotton? Who made the sheets?
Who watched the sheep? Who washed the wool? Who made the blankets for your bed? Whose work are you using when you turn on the light?
Who mined the coal which gives the power to heat and light your room? Men need to do things for other people. They need someone to love.
sheet: cotton bed cover. blanket: warm wool cover. verbs: wash, mine, light, love.
